Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL

Guru
134 posts
Dropped from Ravenous War Bone Skeleton today in CoM on Oakwynd, along with an Ornate Rune Blade. It was visibly equipped.

apparently not dropping on Neh Ashiir anymore
QuoteReply
# Feb 01 2005 at 5:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600042667564
Scholar
200 posts
Been killing Neh Ashiir a few times... she dropped the Dread Shield of the Slayer, the Woodsman's Staff etc.

Apparently this shield only drops on the terror / dread wraith who can pop all over CoM, at specific spawn points I guess but still all over :)

(have found a terror wraith in the first reaver building, as well as on the very top of the zone)

I got one of these shields for 1500pp today in the Bazaar. Another person was asking 7000pp for one, so it looks like I made out.

▲ Page top
Overall....
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2001 at 5:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752437400
1 post
Overall this is a great item that can/will be used into the mid 50's. The ac is great, resists are solid and the obviously beneficial int is a plus. Why must everyone complain and nit-pick everything? Just take it for what it is...a great shield :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 17 2001 at 5:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) the thing that makes this sheild spectacular is the ac. thats a given. the resists are secondary. third would be the 8 in/10 mana (although for a melee slot 8 int really isnt that much).
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 12 2001 at 5:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was second in a roll for one of these today.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 21 2001 at 5:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have one of these lovely shields for sale on the Erollisi Marr server.. 13k is what I am asking. If interested, email me at azraeldarkadder@aol.com.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 23 2001 at 5:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hey im lvl 35 and i have ALOT of money untwinked i get this by buying from all u stupid high levels for cheap and selling for more so.. was in ec one day and i bought this shield for 6,800pp! i can't belive it now i can sell it bak for 15k haha.. there comes a bit of money to put into jewlery
RE: wooot
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 3:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751009961
Scholar
26 posts
You can't go by the prices listed on this site and many of the others completely. This price (15.3k) is a little too high for the shield on my server for example. That was still a good buy though since it is still worth about 10k on BB server.

QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2000 at 5:00 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
Shield is uncommon drop but still about 60%. Rest of the time she drops only quest torch and a no rent key of torsis. Respawn time on neh'ashiir reaver is 2 hours so you might have to kill her twice to get one shield. Very nice shield tho =)

Also she drops the woodsman staff as a rare about 10%.
▲ Page top
RE: Rarity
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 4:58 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591755020361
29 posts
i'm afraid to disagree with mandicus but i must =/

i've killed neh`ashiir 9 times so far trying to get the torch for my epic, so far 9 shields and 0 torches have dropped. oh well, just my luck. never seen the staff though, so i can't comment on that.

edit: 21 kills later, i got my torch
▲ Page top
RE: Rarity

Yup, killed Neh'Ashiir a couple times so far with my guild and we always ended up with the shield. No torch or staff either.
